category_title: Preschoolers engaging in exclusive, manipulative, and rule-breaking play
scenario_title: The Gymnastics Game: Exclusion and Brazen Mischief
minimal_context: Delia and Sarah are setting up a hidden play area behind the storage tables to play the Gymnastics Game during morning free play.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I notice you moved the cushions under the storage tables to set up your Gymnastics Game.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Laying down next to Sarah and whispering) Pretend I am the coolest girl in town... And we are going to have our own kingdom, with our own castle made of colors in the sky, and lava and dinosaurs, okay?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Lizzie is walking over to your corner to ask if she can join in.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Giving a sympathetic look) I’m so sorry, Lizzie, but only two are allowed in Gymnastics. The space is not big enough for three.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What are you going to do next in your game?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Doing a headstand) And you’re my friend, who can never be as cool as me… but you have to go out into the lava and get a throne for me to sit on. Go get Joya's small black wicker Teacher Chair.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: I notice you moved the cushions under the storage tables to set up your Gymnastics Game.

STUDENT: (Laying down next to Sarah and whispering) Pretend I am the coolest girl in town... And we are going to have our own kingdom, with our own castle made of colors in the sky, and lava and dinosaurs, okay?

TUTOR: Lizzie is walking over to your corner to ask if she can join in.

STUDENT: (Giving a sympathetic look) I’m so sorry, Lizzie, but only two are allowed in Gymnastics. The space is not big enough for three.

TUTOR: What are you going to do next in your game?

STUDENT: (Doing a headstand) And you’re my friend, who can never be as cool as me… but you have to go out into the lava and get a throne for me to sit on. Go get Joya's small black wicker Teacher Chair.

task.content: Setting up a hidden play area and engaging in a complex fantasy narrative called the 'Gymnastics Game' while doing headstands

context.environment: Unseen corner behind storage tables, not visible from common activity areas
context.materials: Cushions and pillows stealthily removed from the book area, tile floor, Joya's small black wicker Teacher Chair
context.social_setting: Two girls (Delia and Sarah) cuddling together, whispering, and pretending to sleep

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When a peer (Lizzie) rushes over to the corner and asks to join in
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Delia uses a sympathetic look and pseudo-official tone to exclude the peer, citing space limitations, and later directs her playmate to commit an act of brazen mischief by stealing the teacher's chair
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Nervously glanced around to see if anyone was watching
related_quotes: I’m so sorry, Lizzie, but only two are allowed in Gymnastics. The space is not big enough for three

Pretend I am the coolest girl in town ... And we are going to have our own kingdom, with our own castle made of colors in the sky, and lava and dinosaurs, okay? And you ’re my friend, who can never be as cool as me …but you have to go out into the lava and get a throne for me to sit on.

behavior_patterns.condition: When manipulating group membership or ejecting a current player
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Uses bureaucratic-style rules like 'signing up' to eject peers using a similar reasoning
related_quotes: Sarah, you have to sign up for Gymnastics. You haven ’t signed up, so I ’m so sorry you can ’t do this activity today
